title: Simple User Pronouns
description: This Minecraft plugin allows users to add a pronoun suffix to the end of their username. This pronoun suffix will display in the chat window when the user types.
body:
## **Simple User Pronouns**

Allows users/admins to set a pre-defined list of pronouns as the suffix at the end of their username.
This will show at the end of their username in the Minecraft chat. Additionally, this plug adds the pronoun to
the user's display name. This plugin makes use of LuckPerms to add the suffix and display name parameters. 


## **Required Plugins**:

- LuckPerms
- Vault

**To display the values you need a Minecraft chat plugin that supports LuckPerms, the following were tested**:

- EssentialsX
- EssentialsXChat

## **Usage**:

You need to grant the user or user group the following permissions:


```
- simpleuserpronouns.command.addpronouns
- simpleuserpronouns.command.removepronouns
```

or

```
- simpleuserpronouns.command.*
```



#### Suggestion, Grant the LuckPerms default group the above permissions, by using the following commands:

_lp group default permission set simpleuserpronouns.command.addpronouns_

_lp group default permission set simpleuserpronouns.command.removepronouns_


**Then use the following commands:**

```
/addpronouns <username> <pronoun>
/removepronouns <username>

```
